ideation: This sequence shows a robot playfully interacting with a cupcake. It starts with both arms at the sides, then one arm reaches out to gently hold the cupcake, and ends with both arms bringing the cupcake closer to the face.  The movement should be slow and deliberate, reflecting the enjoyment of a tasty treat.  I'll use subtle joint movements to avoid jerky motions, keeping the movements natural. The robot's lack of elbows will be addressed by creating a slight bend using joint1 and joint2 in the final frame.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, anticipating a treat
the left arm reaches out, right arm stays back
the left arm gently cradles the cupcake, right arm moves closer
both arms bring the cupcake up to enjoy
